sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54725" key="kataparte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-παρτέον</orth>, <sense id="n54725.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must pierce</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:74" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">74</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
